name: Can ChatGPT recommend a real lawyer for my divorce case?
description: No; use state bar or reviews.

mainEntity.name: Can ChatGPT recommend a real lawyer for my divorce case?

acceptedAnswer.text: No; use state bar or reviews.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, it can't provide personalized recommendations or advice. Context: AI not licensed, risks bias/errors; use bar associations instead. Key factors: No vetting, outdated info. Practical guidance: Search state bar directory, Avvo ratings, personal referrals. Avoid AI for this.
